name: Adnene Manai
title: Founder & CEO
bio: Founder and CEO of RocketHooks. Over a decade of experience building distributed systems, serverless architectures, and developer tools. Previously led engineering teams at high-growth startups. Passionate about eliminating undifferentiated infrastructure work so developers can focus on their products.

name: RocketHooks Team
title: Engineering Team
bio: The team behind RocketHooks, building the API transformation platform that turns REST endpoints into real-time event streams. Experts in serverless architecture, event-driven systems, and developer experience.

name: Sarah Chen
title: Head of Developer Relations
bio: Developer advocate with deep expertise in API design, integration patterns, and webhook infrastructure. Writes about practical strategies for real-time data pipelines and event-driven architecture. Contributor to OpenAPI and AsyncAPI specifications.
